section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report July 31 2023
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 31/07/2023
DCE iron ore futures tight by 0.54%. the main contract I 2309 closed 841.5. some traders were active to sell,There are many inquiries from steel mills, but the wait-and-see sentiment increases as prices rise.
